title: Potion of Superior Healing
excerpt: You regain 8d4 + 8 hit_points|Hit Points when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated....
markdown:
# Potion of Superior Healing

You regain 8d4 + 8 [[hit_points]] when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.
